ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "more_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the article */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class or category of the article */,
  "aids_or_not" TEXT /* Indication of whether aids are involved */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the news */,
  "extracted_organizations" TEXT /* Organizations mentioned in the article */,
  "extracted_locations" TEXT /* Locations mentioned in the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the editor who reviewed the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of any associated images */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of any associated videos */,
  "is_paywalled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is behind a paywall */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_name FOREIGN KEY ("source_name") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the news source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the news source is based */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the news source was founded */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reputation of the news source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the news source is considered reliable */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the news category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the news category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the organization is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the organization's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the location is found */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_organizations" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization mentioned in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_locations" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location mentioned in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, researcher, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was from a mobile device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date and time when this version was published */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the editor who made the changes */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the changes made in this version */,
  "is_major_update" INTEGER /* Indicates if the changes are considered a major update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tag_associations" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag associated with the article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the tag to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)
